title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event (July 2025)
text: Open day and campus tour 31 July. This event, now completed, took place on July 31, 2025, at 4:00 PM IST. The location was International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India. The campus tour was an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi, offering attendees the chance to explore state-of-the-art facilities and experience vibrant campus life. It was an opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer its community.
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi hosted a campus tour on July 31, 2025, offering prospective students a chance to explore facilities and campus life in Gurgaon.
